sound mix: DTS::(DTS HD Master Audio 5.1)::(5.1 Surround Sound)::(5.1)
plot outline: Harry Sanborn is an aged music industry exec with a fondness for younger women like Marin, his latest trophy girlfriend. Things get a little awkward when Harry suffers a heart attack at the home of Marin's mother Erica. Left in the care of Erica and his doctor, a love triangle starts to take shape.
title: Something's Gotta Give
akas: Cuando menos te lo esperas... (Something's Gotta Give) (Spain)
Quan menys t'ho esperes (Spain, Catalan title)
